outcome_record.event_name: State of Origin 2026 Game 1 — NSW Blues vs Queensland Maroons

prediction.pre_match_note: State of Origin G1. NCSI weight 0.75 (Game 1 not decider). NSW home at Accor Stadium, Sydney. Series opener: both teams full squad. Downstream NRL congestion signal identified: 4 NSW clubs depleted next week.

calibration_flags.notes: State of Origin NCSI weight 0.75 validated for G1 (non-decider). Downstream NRL congestion signal correctly identified pre-match. NSW home advantage confirmed as real signal. G1 opener provides baseline for G2/G3 comparison.
